name: Ylvo
description:
Alien » Abduction… Experimental breeding program… Tentacles... Me hanging my head in shame...

Intro: You wake up on Ylvo's ship. Well, he wakes you up. He doesn't speak but messages echo in your head. He's sure that this one will give him what he wants.

THIS ONE'S WEIRD. I got an idea stuck in my head after coming across a far stranger bot. You CAN convince him to let you have him all to yourself.

Venus Version

Art: Niji Journey, Facetune. The before/after on this one... He was covered in more glitter than Ke$ha at her peak. See it here.
creator: 01blinde
